scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run bundle && pkg dist/index.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/stixor-crm-win.exe
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run bundle && pkg dist/index.cjs --targets node20-macos-x64 --output dist/stixor-crm-mac
scripts.package:mac-arm: npm run build && npm run bundle && pkg dist/index.cjs --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/stixor-crm-mac-arm64
scripts.package:all: npm run build && npm run bundle && pkg dist/index.cjs --targets node20-win-x64,node20-macos-x64,node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/stixor-crm
